title: anthemis carpatica var. balcanica
intro: Anthemis carpatica var. balcanica, also known as Balkan chamomile, is a variety of Anthemis carpatica, a flowering plant in the daisy family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for soothing skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Balkan chamomile include reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, as well as providing relief from insomnia and menstrual cramps. Balkan chamomile can be prepared as herbal tea, infused oil, or dried flowers for medicinal use, allowing for a range of applications from skin treatments to calming remedies.
